title_en: The Latest AI News We Announced in May 2026

title_zh: 谷歌搜索助你提升二手和复古购物体验的五种方法
title_en: 5 ways Google Search can level up your thrift and vintage shopping

summary_en: Uncover second-hand scores with AI tools in Google Search and Shopping.
why_it_matters_zh: 随着环保和可持续消费趋势的兴起，利用AI技术优化二手和复古购物，能让用户更便捷地找到心仪商品，提升购物体验。
why_it_matters_en: As environmental and sustainable consumption trends rise, using AI technology to optimize thrift and vintage shopping helps users more easily find desired items and enhances their shopping experience.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: 5 ways Google Search can level up your thrift and vintage shopping. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

summary_en: Learn how Googlers used AI to produce Google I/O 2026.

title_zh: 一个智能代理如何通过串联两个Hugging Face空间构建3D巴黎画廊
title_en: How an Agent Built a 3D Paris Gallery by Chaining Two Hugging Face Spaces
summary_zh: 本文介绍了一个智能代理通过将两个Hugging Face Spaces结合使用，成功创建了一个3D巴黎画廊的过程。这个方法展现了多模型协作的潜力，为创建复杂应用提供了新思路。
summary_en: This article explains how an intelligent agent combined two Hugging Face Spaces to successfully build a 3D Paris gallery. This approach demonstrates the potential of multi-model collaboration, offering new ideas for developing complex applications.
why_it_matters_zh: 这种方法体现了利用多个AI空间协同工作的创新思路，增强了模型集成的实用性和灵活性，推动了AI工具在创意领域的应用。
why_it_matters_en: This method showcases an innovative approach to leveraging multiple AI spaces collaboratively, enhancing the practicality and flexibility of model integration, and advancing AI tools' applications in creative fields.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: How an Agent Built a 3D Paris Gallery by Chaining Two Hugging Face Spaces. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: PathoSage：面向病理学多源证据裁决的经验感知代理工作流
title_en: PathoSage: Towards Multi-Source Evidence Adjudication in Pathology via Experience-Aware Agentic Workflow
summary_zh: 本文提出了PathoSage框架，旨在解决病理学多模态局部推理中的证据冲突和错觉问题。PathoSage通过知识检索、证据收集和证据裁决三阶段流程，采用结构化证据审议机制独立评估来自不同工具的异质证据，分析冲突并在新上下文中生成最终判断，降低锚定偏差。此外，引入了无训练的Beta-Bernoulli经验系统，利用持续信用分配建模工具长期可靠性，提升未来工具使用的先验权重。实验证明PathoSage有效缓解了视觉问答的幻觉和分类器分歧，显著优于现有强基线，为病理学AI代理的鲁棒性提供了关键方法。
summary_en: This work presents PathoSage, a framework designed to address evidence conflicts and hallucinations in patch-level pathology multimodal reasoning. PathoSage implements a three-stage pipeline of knowledge retrieval, evidence collection, and evidence adjudication, featuring a Structured Evidence Deliberation component that independently evaluates heterogeneous evidence from multiple tools, performs conflict analysis, and generates final judgments in a fresh context to reduce anchoring bias. Additionally, a training-free Beta-Bernoulli experience system is introduced to model long-term tool reliability via continuous credit assignment, improving prior confidence in future tool use. Experiments demonstrate that PathoSage effectively mitigates VQA hallucinations and classifier disagreements, outperforming strong pathology MLLM and agent baselines, highlighting explicit evidence adjudication and reliability-aware tool modeling as key to robust pathology AI agents.
why_it_matters_zh: 病理学中的多模态推理面临证据冲突和模型幻觉等挑战，导致诊断不可靠。PathoSage通过明确分离证据处理阶段和引入经验感知机制，有效提升了推理的准确性和稳定性，这对增强临床辅助诊断的可信度具有重要意义。
why_it_matters_en: Multimodal reasoning in pathology faces challenges such as conflicting evidence and model hallucinations, leading to unreliable diagnoses. PathoSage improves accuracy and stability by explicitly separating evidence processing stages and incorporating experience-aware mechanisms, which is crucial for enhancing trustworthiness in clinical decision support systems.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: PathoSage: Towards Multi-Source Evidence Adjudication in Pathology via Experience-Aware Agentic Workflow. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: OmniMem：面向流式视听大型语言模型的扰动感知内存压缩
title_en: OmniMem: Perturbation-aware Memory Compression for Streaming Audio-Visual LLMs
summary_zh: 音视频大型语言模型在长视频理解中面临视频标记和键值缓存线性增长的问题。OmniMem提出了一种内存高效的流式框架，通过模态感知的内存分配策略，分别管理视觉和音频上下文，解决两者标记数量不平衡的问题。其利用扰动感知内存选择，保留有信息且非冗余的键值状态，实现紧凑内存同时维持长距离理解。结合预算感知微调，OmniMem在多个基准测试中比强训练自由压缩基线提升2-4%的准确率，微调后再提升1-2%。
summary_en: Audio-visual large language models face challenges in long-video understanding due to linear growth of video tokens and key-value caches. OmniMem introduces a memory-efficient streaming framework with modality-aware memory allocation to separately manage visual and audio contexts, addressing token imbalance. Its perturbation-aware memory selection preserves informative, non-redundant states, enabling compact memory without sacrificing long-range understanding. Budget-aware fine-tuning further consolidates information. Experiments show OmniMem improves accuracy by 2-4% over strong training-free compression baselines, with an additional 1-2% gain after fine-tuning.
why_it_matters_zh: 该工作针对流式音视频大模型的内存瓶颈提出新颖的压缩方法，通过考虑模态差异和扰动影响，有效提升了长视频推理的效率和准确率，对实际部署具有重要意义。
why_it_matters_en: This work addresses memory bottlenecks in streaming audio-visual large models, proposing a novel compression approach that considers modality differences and perturbation impact, effectively improving efficiency and accuracy in long-video inference, which is important for practical deployment.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: OmniMem: Perturbation-aware Memory Compression for Streaming Audio-Visual LLMs. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: Syll：支持多界面执行的开源个人自动化工具
title_en: Syll: Open-Source Personal Automation with Cross-Surface Execution
summary_zh: arXiv发布了Syll项目，这是一个开源、自托管的多模态代理系统，整合了MCP/API工具、命令行执行和图形界面控制，支持跨异构界面的计算机使用协调。用户可以通过示范直接教学，系统将示范编译为可复用技能，并通过日志、关键帧和审批检查点实现多模态执行反馈，方便检查和控制。Syll的记忆、技能和治理机制均作为本地可编辑内容，支持用户检视和扩展。已在Photoshop、Audition、Stardew Valley、macOS Finder等生产级应用上验证。
summary_en: arXiv announces Syll, an open-source, self-hosted multimodal agent harness combining MCP/API tools, CLI execution, and visual GUI control to enable coordination across heterogeneous computing interfaces. Users teach procedures by direct demonstration, which Syll compiles into reusable skills, while execution feedback includes logs, keyframes, and approval checkpoints for inspection. Memory, skills, routines, and governance are externalized as editable local artifacts, supporting inspection and extension. Validated on production desktop apps like Adobe Photoshop and macOS Finder.
why_it_matters_zh: Syll突破了传统自动化工具单一界面的限制，支持用户直接示范教学和持续扩展，提升了个人自动化的透明度和易用性，适合开发者和高级用户打造个性化、可审计的自动化流程。
why_it_matters_en: Syll overcomes the limitation of single-interface automation tools by enabling direct user teaching, multimodal feedback, and editable local artifacts, enhancing transparency and usability of personal automation. It provides developers and advanced users a practical, customizable, and auditable foundation for automation workflows.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Syll: Open-Source Personal Automation with Cross-Surface Execution. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 通过一致性驱动的强化学习提升跨语言事实回忆能力
title_en: Improving Cross-Lingual Factual Recall via Consistency-Driven Reinforcement Learning
summary_zh: 本文介绍了PolyFact数据集，一个包含12种语言、基于维基数据的大规模多语言事实问答数据集，包含10万个事实。基于该数据集，研究者比较了轻量持续预训练（CPT）、监督微调（SFT）和通过群体相对策略优化（GRPO）的强化学习方法在提升Qwen-2.5-7B和OLMo-2-1124-7B模型跨语言事实回忆能力上的表现。结果显示，GRPO在提升跨语言一致性和对未见语言的泛化能力方面均优于SFT，而在并行数据上的CPT增益有限。机理分析表明，GRPO通过减少多层感知机层和注意力头中的语言特化，促进了更多共享的跨语言表示。研究者同时发布了相关代码、模型及数据集。
summary_en: This paper presents PolyFact, a large-scale parallel multilingual factual QA dataset grounded in Wikidata, covering 100,000 facts across 12 typologically diverse languages. Using PolyFact, the authors compare light continual pretraining (CPT), supervised fine-tuning (SFT), and reinforcement learning via Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to improve cross-lingual factual recall in Qwen-2.5-7B and OLMo-2-1124-7B models. They find GRPO consistently outperforms SFT by enhancing cross-lingual consistency and generalizing better to unseen languages, while CPT on parallel data yields limited benefits. Mechanistic analyses reveal GRPO reduces language specialization in MLP layers and attention heads, encouraging more shared cross-lingual representations. The authors release their code, models, and dataset.
why_it_matters_zh: 跨语言事实不一致性影响多语言大模型的可靠性，提升模型在不同语言中的事实召回能力对全球用户体验和应用推广至关重要。通过引入统一的强化学习方法，研究有效缓解了语言特化问题，提高了模型的跨语言表现能力。
why_it_matters_en: Cross-lingual factual inconsistency limits the reliability of multilingual large language models. Enhancing factual recall across languages is crucial for global user experience and broader application deployment. Introducing a unified reinforcement learning approach effectively mitigates language specialization and improves cross-lingual model performance.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Improving Cross-Lingual Factual Recall via Consistency-Driven Reinforcement Learning. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 面向长时域Web代理的信号驱动观察
title_en: Signal-Driven Observation for Long-Horizon Web Agents
summary_zh: 针对长时域操作的Web代理，每一步都需处理庞大的DOM和辅助功能树信息，导致上下文逐步退化影响推理。本文提出信号驱动观察（SDO）方法，通过专门子调用读取完整DOM，但仅返回与任务相关的元素及其选择器，且仅在轻量信号触发时重新调用，如URL变化、新交互元素出现、动作失败或浏览器事件。该方法强调将观察压缩作为Web代理设计的架构核心决策。
summary_en: Web agents operating over long horizons consume large raw DOM and accessibility trees at every action step, causing context degradation before task completion. This paper proposes Signal-Driven Observation (SDO), a mechanism where a dedicated sub-call reads the full DOM but returns only task-relevant elements and selectors, re-invoked only when a lightweight signal detector triggers based on events like URL transitions or action failures. This approach highlights observation compression as a key architectural choice for web agents.
why_it_matters_zh: 传统方法每步骤观察频率与动作频率紧耦合，导致过多无关信息处理，影响推理准确性。SDO通过事件驱动降低无效观察，提升长时任务的效率和效果。
why_it_matters_en: Because traditional methods tie observation frequency directly to action frequency, they process excessive irrelevant information, degrading reasoning. SDO reduces unnecessary observation via event-driven triggers, enhancing efficiency and performance in long-horizon tasks.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Signal-Driven Observation for Long-Horizon Web Agents. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 扩展的多轮合成对话数据集用于钓鱼短信检测
title_en: An Expanded Synthetic Conversation Dataset for Multi-Turn Smishing Detection
summary_zh: 该研究扩展了先前的COVA数据集，推出了包含10,985条老年人受骗类别对话的COVA-X数据集，通过改进生成流程提高数据质量。基于该数据集，Longformer模型表现超越了XGBoost，准确率达79.71%，宏F1为0.7786，验证了大型对话语料对Transformer模型性能提升的重要性。研究还报道了标签纠正率提升12.7倍和数据集清洗对模型效果的正面影响。
summary_en: This work expands the prior COVA dataset to COVA-X with 10,985 elder-targeted scam multi-turn conversations generated via an improved pipeline enhancing data quality. Retraining classifiers on COVA-X shows Longformer outperforming XGBoost with 79.71% accuracy and 0.7786 macro F1, confirming that larger conversation corpora enable Transformers to better leverage context. The study also demonstrates a 12.7× improvement in label correction and verifies dataset refinement benefits all three classifier architectures.
why_it_matters_zh: 这一研究展示了通过扩充及质量提升的多轮合成对话数据，Transformer模型能够显著提升钓鱼短信检测效果，推动了老年人诈骗防护技术的进步。
why_it_matters_en: This research shows that enlarging and refining synthetic multi-turn conversation datasets enables Transformer models to significantly improve smishing detection, advancing technology for protecting elderly individuals from scams.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: An Expanded Synthetic Conversation Dataset for Multi-Turn Smishing Detection. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 打造造福所有人的未来：我们的计划
title_en: Built to benefit everyone: our plan
summary_zh: 未来人工智能的愿景，重点关注获取途径、安全性和共享繁荣，OpenAI致力于确保通用人工智能造福所有人。
summary_en: A vision for the future of AI, focusing on access, safety, and shared prosperity as OpenAI works to ensure AGI benefits everyone.
why_it_matters_zh: 该计划展示了OpenAI致力于普惠人工智能的战略，强调公平、安全及共同利益，体现了其长远发展的责任感。
why_it_matters_en: This plan showcases OpenAI's commitment to inclusive AI, emphasizing fairness, safety, and shared benefit, reflecting its responsible approach to long-term development.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Built to benefit everyone: our plan. Category: models_products. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 推出OpenAI经济研究交流平台
title_en: Introducing the OpenAI Economic Research Exchange
summary_zh: OpenAI推出经济研究交流平台，旨在研究人工智能对就业、生产力和经济的影响。现已开放精选研究项目的申请。
summary_en: OpenAI launches the Economic Research Exchange to study AI’s impact on jobs, productivity, and the economy. Applications are now open for selected research projects.
why_it_matters_zh: 随着人工智能的发展，其对经济结构和劳动力市场的深远影响需要深入研究，OpenAI的这一平台为学者提供了合作与交流的机会。
why_it_matters_en: As AI advances, its profound effects on economic structures and labor markets require thorough investigation; OpenAI's platform offers scholars opportunities for collaboration and exchange.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Introducing the OpenAI Economic Research Exchange. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 开源社区支持OpenEnv用于智能强化学习
title_en: The Open Source Community is backing OpenEnv for Agentic RL
summary_zh: 开源社区正在支持OpenEnv项目，以推动智能强化学习（Agentic RL）技术的发展。该项目致力于为智能体提供更好的环境支持，促进强化学习算法的研究和应用。
summary_en: The open source community is backing the OpenEnv project to advance agentic reinforcement learning (RL) technology. The project aims to provide better environment support for agents, facilitating research and applications in RL algorithms.
why_it_matters_zh: 随着强化学习技术的不断发展，社区需要更开放和高效的工具支持智能体训练。OpenEnv作为开源项目，能让开发者共同维护和改进环境，推动智能体应用的普及。
why_it_matters_en: As reinforcement learning technology evolves, the community requires open and efficient tools to support agent training. OpenEnv, as an open source project, enables developers to collaboratively maintain and improve environments, promoting the widespread use of agentic applications.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: The Open Source Community is backing OpenEnv for Agentic RL. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: Nemotron 3.5 内容安全：面向全球企业AI的可定制多模态安全
title_en: Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety: Customizable Multimodal Safety for Global Enterprise AI
summary_zh: Hugging Face 发布了 Nemotron 3.5 内容安全平台，提供多模态的可定制安全方案，旨在保护全球企业AI应用免受有害内容影响，提升企业应用的信任度和合规性。
summary_en: Hugging Face has released the Nemotron 3.5 content safety platform, offering customizable multimodal safety solutions designed to protect global enterprise AI applications from harmful content, enhancing trust and compliance in corporate AI deployments.
why_it_matters_zh: 随着企业越来越多地采用AI，保障其内容安全变得至关重要。Nemotron 3.5 通过提供灵活且多模态的安全保护，满足了全球企业在合规与风险管理方面的需求。
why_it_matters_en: As enterprises increasingly adopt AI, ensuring content safety is critical. Nemotron 3.5 meets global enterprise needs for compliance and risk management by providing flexible, multimodal safety protections.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety: Customizable Multimodal Safety for Global Enterprise AI. Category: business_investment. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
